subcodes.first_line: O Abdullah, praise thou the Countenance of the Desired One, for through His grace thou hast attained unto the Most Great Ocean, time and again [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای عبدالله حمد کن طلعت مقصود را که از فضلش ببحر اعظم واصل شدی و مره بعد مره
subcodes.subjects: @laws of God; of the Kitab-i-Aqdas, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @firmness in the Covenant, @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God
